package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "compress/gzip"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_item: gzip readers and writers rebuilt for each item in a loop.
type CaseGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItemDTO struct {
    ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
    Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

func PositiveGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItem(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItemDTO) error {
    for _, item := range items {
        source := bytes.NewReader(item.Payload)
        reader, _ := gzip.NewReader(source)
        if reader != nil {
            _, _ = io.ReadAll(reader)
            _ = reader.Close()
        }

        var compressed bytes.Buffer
        writer := gzip.NewWriter(&compressed)
        _, _ = writer.Write(item.Payload)
        _ = writer.Close()
    }
    return nil
}
